title: HealthByte: Honest Health & Nutrition Engine
description: A personalized nutrition engine that classifies food with EfficientNet-B0 and reports calories as uncertainty bands, not false-precision numbers. Stores biometric time-series in SQLite, pulls activity via Google Fit OAuth, and surfaces only statistically honest correlations (Spearman with Benjamini-Hochberg FDR control). FastAPI service that picks honest over impressive.
